title: bulbophyllum cornu-ovis
intro: Bulbophyllum cornu-ovis, also known as the 'ram's horn orchid', is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it a valuable plant in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Bulbophyllum cornu-ovis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
